From in-house die engineering to extrusion and finishing, NKACO delivers project-ready aluminum systems from Dammam.

To see profiles

NKACO® turns ambitious specifications into Saudi-made aluminum systems through in-house die engineering, extrusion, finishing, and project-ready supply.

NKACO
Saudi aluminum, engineered to perform

Architectural Profiles

Facade, window, door, and curtain-wall profiles engineered for precise fabrication and dependable site performance.

Industrial Supply

Complex and large-section profiles for industrial, mobility, and custom applications.

Finish Quality

Integrated extrusion, anodizing, powder coating, and packing protect finish consistency from press to project.

Saudi Base, Export Reach

Made in Dammam for Saudi ambitions and export markets.

One Integrated Aluminum Partner

Profiles

Precision profiles for facades, windows, doors, and industrial systems, engineered around drawings, tolerances, and finish requirements.

In-house Die Engineering

From simulation and tooling to trials and production, our in-house team designs and manufactures extrusion dies for repeatable geometry and tighter process control.

Finishing options

Powder coating and anodizing deliver durable, consistent surfaces matched to architectural and industrial applications.

Reliable delivery

Integrated planning, packing, and dispatch from Dammam keep Saudi projects and export schedules moving.
